content:
Are there any plans to implement dynamic battle sprites in the future? It is understandable if it is incompatible with the design of the main game since your team has shared HP, but in the PvP mode where HP is separate, this might be a good addition?

It's already shown in the prologue of the game itself, where Ramona stands up after getting her shoulder pierced through by our first enemy.

-------------------------------

（译文由DeepSeek生成，如有不妥请多包涵。）

未来是否有计划加入动态战斗立绘？虽然能理解这项功能可能不符合主游戏的设计理念（毕竟团队共享生命值），但在玩家对战模式中，由于生命值独立计算，或许会是个不错的补充？

游戏序章其实已经展示过这个构想——当拉蒙娜的肩膀被第一个敌人刺穿后，她就曾有过起身的动态表现。
thread_title: Dynamic Battle Sprite | 动态战斗立绘
